title: Diagnosis Coding: Using the ICD-10-CM
description: Learn to identify ICD-10-CM structure and format, recognize key features, and find the right diagnosis codes. Free web-based training updated September 2025. 60-minute contact hours.

title: Procedure Coding: Using the ICD-10-PCS
description: Understand the ICD-10-PCS system structure, table format, and coding conventions for inpatient procedure coding. Free web-based training updated September 2025. 60-minute contact hours.

title: Medicare Billing: 837I & Form CMS-1450
description: Covers institutional claim submission using the 837I electronic transaction and the CMS-1450 paper form. Includes required data elements, common errors, and Medicare billing rules. Updated July 2025. 90-minute contact hours.

title: Combating Medicare Parts C and D Fraud, Waste & Abuse
description: Required training covering how to identify, prevent, and report fraud, waste, and abuse in Medicare Parts C and D programs. Updated July 2025. 30-minute contact hours.

title: World of Medicare
description: Comprehensive overview of the Medicare program including Parts A, B, C, and D, Medigap, eligibility, enrollment, and coverage. A foundational course for anyone new to Medicare billing. Updated December 2024. 90-minute contact hours.

title: SNF Consolidated Billing
description: Explains Skilled Nursing Facility consolidated billing requirements, which services are included in the SNF PPS payment, and how to handle ancillary services correctly. Updated March 2024. 60-minute contact hours.

title: 2026 Medicare Part C and Part D Reporting Requirements and Data Validation
description: Covers the 2026 reporting requirements, data validation procedures, and compliance expectations for Medicare Advantage (Part C) and Prescription Drug Plan (Part D) organizations. Published March 2026. 120-minute contact hours.

title: CMS National Provider Calls & Webcasts
description: Live educational teleconferences and webcasts hosted by CMS on Medicare policy, billing updates, and compliance topics. AAPC accepts the registration confirmation email as proof of attendance in place of a certificate. 1 CEU per hour of attendance.

title: Healthcare Business Monthly — Monthly CEU Quiz
description: Earn 1 CEU per month by completing the quiz in AAPC's Healthcare Business Monthly magazine. Covers coding updates, compliance news, and industry topics. Available via the AAPC Content app or online. Quizzes expire 12 months after publish date.

title: AAPC Free Quarterly CEU Webinars
description: AAPC hosts free live webinars each quarter on rotating coding and compliance topics. Each session awards 1 CEU toward any AAPC credential. Check the AAPC events calendar for upcoming dates and topics.

title: AAPC Local Chapter Meetings
description: Earn 1 CEU per hour of education at any AAPC local chapter meeting. With 500+ chapters across the US, local meetings are one of the easiest ways to earn free CEUs while networking with other coders. Check the AAPC website to find your local chapter calendar.

title: Non-Vascular Interventional Radiology Coding Seminar
description: Half-day specialty seminar covering non-vascular IR coding including drainage procedures, biopsies, ablations, and vertebroplasty. Available as a standalone session or as part of the larger Las Vegas coding conference. Also approved for 4.0 ASRT CEUs.

title: Peripheral Vascular Diagnostic and Interventional Coding Seminar
description: Intensive two-day seminar covering catheter placements, diagnostic angiography, peripheral interventional procedures, and endovascular surgery coding. One of the most comprehensive vascular coding courses available. Also approved for 15.0 ASRT CEUs.

title: ZHealth eLearning Courses — IR & Cardiology Modules
description: Self-paced online modules covering interventional radiology and cardiology coding topics. Post-test required to earn credit. Starting at $25 per module — ZHealth Online members get 10% off. Modules expire at end of calendar year.

title: ZHealth Medical Coding Webinars — IR, Cardiology & Vascular
description: 90–120 minute web-based presentations on interventional radiology, cardiology, and vascular surgery coding. Post-test required to receive CEU certificate. Check site for current available topics and pricing.

title: ZHealth Las Vegas Coding Seminar — June 2026
description: Multi-day specialty coding conference at Caesars Palace, Las Vegas covering interventional radiology, cardiology, electrophysiology, and vascular surgery. Choose individual half-day sessions or the full conference. Earn up to 27.5 AAPC CEUs. Sessions available live in-person and virtual.

title: AMBA Free CEU Webinar Series
description: Regular series of free live webinars covering medical billing, compliance, Medicare updates, and coding topics. Open to members and non-members. 1 CEU per webinar. All CMS webinars and teleconferences are also pre-approved for AMBA CEUs. Register on the AMBA website for upcoming dates.

title: Denial Resolution and Management Course
description: Learn to identify, analyze, and resolve denied claims to ensure timely reimbursement. Covers the full revenue cycle, CMS-1500 completion, EOB review, denial types, appeal strategies, and root cause analysis.

title: Intro to AI Concepts for Medical Billing and Coding
description: Learn how AI, natural language processing, and machine learning are transforming medical coding and billing workflows. Covers ethical considerations, data privacy, and future trends. Free for AAPC members.

title: Advanced ICD-10-CM Code Set Training
description: Advance your ICD-10-CM skills with clinical concepts for commonly treated conditions across 12 body systems. Covers outpatient coding guidelines, coding conventions, neoplasms, pregnancy, and more. Basic ICD-10-CM knowledge recommended.

title: Certified Evaluation and Management Coder (CEMC) Online Training Course
description: Master E/M coding guidelines including MDM, time-based leveling, modifiers, and Medicare billing rules. Covers NCCI, ICD-10-CM, and CPT rules for office, outpatient, hospital, and consultation services. Recommended for coders with 2+ years of E/M experience.

title: Dental Billing and Coding Course
description: Master CDT, CPT, ICD-10-CM, and HCPCS Level II coding for dental services. Covers dental anatomy, cross coding, claim forms, revenue cycle, and compliance. Ideal for dental coders, billers, hygienists, and medical coders expanding into dentistry.

title: Credentialing Specialist Course
description: Learn the end-to-end provider credentialing process including applications, documentation requirements, payer enrollment, and tracking re-credentialing over time. No prerequisites required.

title: Electronic Health Record and Electronic Medical Record Systems Course
description: Understand EHR and EMR navigation, template development, regulatory considerations, best practices, and common misuses. Learn how to provide feedback to providers to improve clinical documentation. No prerequisites required.

title: Healthcare Informatics Course
description: Explore how data is gathered and used to improve healthcare delivery. Covers patient intake, EHR introduction, database storage, security, predictive modeling, and reporting. No prerequisites required.

title: Home Health Coding Course
description: Learn the ins and outs of home health coding under the Patient-Driven Groupings Model (PDGM). Covers ICD-10-CM guidelines for home health, OASIS-D, clinical episode management, and reimbursement impact. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of coding experience.

title: Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation Coding Course
description: Learn CPT, ICD-10-CM, and E/M coding for physical therapy, occupational therapy, and rehabilitation services. Includes HCPCS Level II codes, modifiers, and real-world case studies. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of pro-fee coding experience.

title: Revenue Cycle Management Course
description: Get an in-depth introduction to healthcare revenue cycle management. Covers patient registration, claims processing, denial management, reimbursement, KPIs, and the soft skills needed to succeed as an RCM professional. No prerequisites required.

title: Skilled Nursing Facility Coding Course
description: Master ICD-10-CM, E/M, and CPT coding for skilled nursing facility services. Covers the Patient Driven Payment Model (PDPM), MDS 3.0, consolidated billing, Medicare Part A, and real-world case studies. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of coding experience.

title: Mental Health Billing Course
description: Comprehensive online course covering mental health billing from the ground up. Topics include coding, insurance, claim building, psychiatry billing, case studies, and terminology. Designed for billers, counselors, office managers, and anyone billing for mental health providers.

title: Introduction to Interventional Radiology Coding: Vascular Procedures (2026)
description: Geared toward brand-new IR coders, this eLearning course covers vascular procedure terminology, component coding concepts, edits, modifiers, and procedure-type overviews. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Introduction to Interventional Radiology Coding: Non-Vascular Procedures (2026)
description: Geared toward brand-new IR coders, this eLearning course covers non-vascular procedure terminology, component coding concepts, edits, modifiers, and procedure-type overviews. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Aortic Endografts (2026)
description: Covers stent graft placement in the thoracic and lumbar aorta via transcatheter approach, including adjunct procedures, endovascular leak treatment, and follow-up coding. Includes real coding examples. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Abdominal Aortography and Lower Extremity Angiography (2026)
description: Coding instructions for abdominal aorta and extremity artery imaging, performed in combination or separately. Covers selective and non-selective procedures with numerous real case examples from physician documentation. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Arteriovenous Dialysis Access Imaging and Interventions (2026)
description: Covers CPT coding for all dialysis access devices including AV shunts, fistulae, dialysis catheter insertion, and follow-up procedures. Includes imaging guidance and percutaneous intervention coding. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Image-Guided Percutaneous Fluid Collection Drainage & Management Procedures (2026)
description: Covers coding guidelines for initial abscess drainage procedures, follow-up imaging, and maintenance of in-dwelling drainage catheters. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Diagnostic Venography (2026)
description: Covers coding for all types of diagnostic venography including cervicocerebral, visceral, renal, and extremity venography. Reviews catheter placement and imaging procedure coding. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Transcatheter Embolization (2026)
description: Explores all types of percutaneous embolizations from thrombin injection to permanent and test occlusion procedures. In-depth discussion of conflicting coding rules and code selection. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Image-Guided Percutaneous and Transcatheter Biopsies (2026)
description: Covers CPT coding for fine needle aspirations, percutaneous core biopsies, and transcatheter biopsies performed with imaging guidance. Includes case studies to practice coding from reports. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Gastrointestinal Interventions (2026)
description: Covers GI procedures performed via natural orifice or percutaneous approach, including diagnostic, therapeutic, and tube maintenance procedures. Includes real-life coding examples. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Transcatheter Mechanical Thrombectomy (2026)
description: Covers coding for coronary artery, AV hemodialysis access, peripheral arterial, and peripheral venous mechanical thrombectomy procedures. Includes device terminology, coding rules, and case studies from physician documentation. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Non-Selective Catheter Placements (2026)
description: Overview of non-selective catheter placement coding across all vascular systems. Covers peripheral and visceral vascular procedure codes and the rules surrounding their assignment. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Selective Catheter Placement in the Arterial System (2026)
description: Covers selective arterial catheter placement coding across cervicocerebral, visceral, renal, upper extremity, and lower extremity anatomical areas. Includes real-life coding examples for common scenarios. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Cervicocerebral Arteriography (2026)
description: Covers diagnostic angiography coding for cervical and cerebral carotid arteries, arch aorta, vertebral, cerebral, brachiocephalic, and subclavian arteries. Explains included vs. separately reportable imaging and catheter placements with case studies. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Lower Extremity Arterial Endovascular Revascularization (2026)
description: Covers the unique and complex bundling rules for transcatheter lower extremity arterial revascularization, including artery-specific coding differences. Prepares you to accurately code these interventions from physician documentation. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Percutaneous Coronary Interventions (2026)
description: Covers all types of transcatheter percutaneous coronary interventions and their coding rules. Includes specific examples for each intervention type to assist with converting physician reports to CPT codes for billing. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Transcatheter Infusion Therapy (2026)
description: Details coding rules for transcatheter infusions performed in imaging labs, including thrombolysis in coronary and non-coronary vessels and cerebral vasospasm treatment. Includes real-case examples correlating documentation to CPT codes. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Percutaneous Biliary Tract Interventions (2026)
description: Covers percutaneous biliary tract procedures including drainage catheter placement, stent placement, dilation, embolization, and procedures via direct needle access or existing drainage catheters into the gallbladder and bile ducts. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Percutaneous Urinary Tract Interventions (2026)
description: Covers percutaneous urinary tract procedures including drainage catheter placement, stent placement, dilation, embolization, and procedures performed via nephrostomy or ureterostomy tracts. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Non-Coronary Vascular Stent Placement (2026)
description: Covers vascular stent placement coding for carotid, vertebral, TIPS, venous, visceral, and renal arteries — excluding coronary and lower extremity revascularization vessels. Organized by anatomical area with real-case examples for each CPT code. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Diagnostic Cardiac Catheterizations (2026)
description: Covers all diagnostic cardiac catheterization procedure codes including when each is used, what's included, and when to report add-on codes. Case examples for converting physician dictated reports to CPT codes. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Electrophysiology Procedures (2026)
description: Covers transcatheter electrophysiology procedures including diagnostic pacing, recording, arrhythmia induction, mapping, and therapeutic ablation. Coding rules for common procedure combinations with actual case examples. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Transvenous and Leadless Cardiac Pacemakers (2026)
description: Covers coding for all cardiac pacemaker procedures including device placement, replacement, and removal, as well as electrode placement, replacement, repair, and removal. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Implantable Defibrillators (2026)
description: Covers coding for all transvenous ICD procedures including implantation, revision, replacement, upgrade, electrode procedures, and pocket revision. Thorough discussion of CPT coding for implantable cardioverter-defibrillators. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Coronary Artery Bypass Grafts (2026)
description: Covers CPT coding rules for coronary artery bypass graft surgery including vein and arterial grafts, concurrent surgical procedures, and included services. Multiple case examples for accurate code reporting. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding for Transcatheter Heart Valve Repair and Replacement (2026)
description: Detailed coding instructions for transcatheter repair or replacement of aortic, pulmonic, tricuspid, and mitral heart valves. Includes case examples and common concurrent procedures. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CPT Coding Updates for Interventional Radiology, Cardiology, and Vascular and Cardiothoracic Surgery (2026)
description: High-level overview of extensive 2026 CPT coding changes for IR, cardiology, cardiothoracic surgery, and endovascular surgery. Led by expert physician coder Dr. Zielske. Includes numerous coding examples. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Basic Catheter Selections (2026)
description: Covers choosing the correct catheter selection codes during complex diagnostic and interventional cases. Focuses on physician documentation, anatomy, vascular systems, vascular orders and families, and selective vs. non-selective placement. Led by Dr. Dunn. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Diagnostic Peripheral Angiography (2026)
description: Reviews catheter selection codes and CPT 70,000-series imaging S&I codes. Covers extremity, visceral, cervicocerebral, thoracic, abdominal arterial, venous, pulmonary, and portal venous imaging. Led by expert coder Jeff Majchrzak. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Peripheral Vascular Intervention: Part 1 (2026)
description: Covers angioplasty, atherectomy, and stenting throughout the vascular system including lower extremity, visceral, upper extremity, venous, and cervicocerebral endovascular revascularization. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Peripheral Vascular Intervention: Part 2 (2026)
description: Covers percutaneous embolization, thrombectomy, and infusion procedures (thrombolytic and non-thrombolytic) on native and graft vessels. Includes stand-alone and combined intervention coding. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Peripheral Vascular Intervention: Part 3 (2026)
description: Covers endovascular stent grafts (TEVAR, EVAR, FEVAR) and venous interventions including TIPS, filter placement, and saphenous vein ablations. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Non-Vascular Interventional Radiology Coding: Part 1 (2026)
description: Covers coding for genitourinary, biliary, and GI procedures including diagnostic cholangiography, nephrostogram, drainage tube placement/replacement/removal, percutaneous GI procedures, stone removal, dilation, and conversion. Led by Jeff Majchrzak. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Non-Vascular Interventional Radiology Coding: Part 2 (2026)
description: Covers percutaneous biopsies, abscess and cyst drainages, and tumor ablations. Includes needle aspiration vs. biopsy differences, breast biopsy and localization codes, drainage tube placement, aspiration, and imaging evaluation. Led by Jeff Majchrzak. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Dialysis Access Coding (2026)
description: Covers creation, assessment, and maintenance of dialysis grafts including shunts, fistulae, venoplasty, stent placement, embolization, and central venous access procedures. Led by Dr. Dunn. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Neurointerventional Coding (2026)
description: Covers complex endovascular procedures in the head, neck, and spine including intracranial angioplasty, vasospasm therapy, embolization, venous sampling, thrombolysis, thrombectomy, and carotid/vertebral/intracranial stenting. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiology Part 1: Diagnostic Cardiac Catheterizations (2026)
description: Covers coding guidelines and documentation for cardiac catheterization and coronary angiography, including common peripheral diagnostic procedures performed alongside heart catheterizations. Led by Dr. Dunn. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiology Part 2: Interventional Cardiology Coding (2026)
description: Covers coronary artery interventions (stent, PTCA, atherectomy), thrombectomy, thrombolysis, IVUS, OCT, FFR, and cardiac chamber interventions including PFO, ASD, VSD, PDA closure, valve repairs, valvuloplasty, and left atrial appendage ablation. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiology Part 3: Peripherals in the Catheterization Lab (2026)
description: Covers peripheral diagnostic and interventional procedures in the cath lab including catheter selections, diagnostic imaging, peripheral and visceral angioplasty, atherectomy, stent placement, thrombolysis, thrombectomy, and embolization. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiology Part 4: Electrophysiology, Pacemaker, and Defibrillator Coding (2026)
description: Covers EP procedures including mapping, pharmacologic challenge, diagnostic studies, and ablation. Reviews pacemaker and defibrillator insertions, revisions, removals, lead revisions, and defibrillation testing. Includes the five EP ablation codes with case examples. Led by Dr. Dunn. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiology Part 5: Congenital Heart Coding (2026)
description: Covers diagnostic cardiac catheterization, imaging, and interventions for patients with congenital heart defects. Includes common congenital syndromes, anatomy, peripheral procedures, cardiac chamber interventions, bundling, and documentation requirements. Led by Dr. Zielske. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: Cardiothoracic Surgery Coding (2026)
description: Covers open and endovascular cardiac and thoracic procedures including mediastinal, operative ablations, CABG, valves, lung (open and VATS), assist devices, structural heart, transplants, and thoracic aorta repairs. Led by Dr. Dunn. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: CIRCC Exam Prep (2026)
description: Focused review for those preparing to take the AAPC CIRCC credentialing exam. Covers 2026 code updates in IR and coronary arterial intervention, high-level content overview, and test-taking skills. Led by Jayna Tuominen. 10% off for ZHealth Online members.

title: ICD-10-CM: Diagnosis Coding — A Comprehensive Program Organized by Body System
description: Comprehensive ICD-10-CM program covering structure, conventions, general guidelines, and chapter-specific coding across all major body systems. Updated for FY 2026 code set. 16-week enrollment period.

title: ICD-10-CM: Code Updates for April 1, 2026
description: Free, self-paced course covering ICD-10-CM code set and guideline changes effective April 1, 2026. Includes new/revised Tabular coding notes, Excludes1 to Excludes2 changes, index updates, and a comprehensive discussion of guideline changes.

title: ICD-10-CM Code Updates: Essentials (2026)
description: Concise overview of the 2026 ICD-10-CM code changes. Covers what changed, what it means, and how to apply it. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: ICD-10-CM Code Updates: In-Depth (2026)
description: Comprehensive deep-dive into the 2026 ICD-10-CM code changes with detailed explanations of complex coding concepts. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: ICD-10-PCS Code Updates: Essentials (2026)
description: Concise overview of the 2026 ICD-10-PCS code changes. Covers what changed, what it means, and how to apply it. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: ICD-10-PCS Code Updates: In-Depth (2026)
description: Comprehensive deep-dive into the 2026 ICD-10-PCS code changes with detailed explanations of complex coding concepts. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: CPT Code Updates: Facility (2026)
description: Covers 2026 CPT code changes from a facility coding perspective. Learn what changed, what it means, and how to apply it accurately. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: CPT Code Updates: Professional Fee (2026)
description: Covers 2026 CPT code changes from a professional fee coding perspective. Learn what changed, what it means, and how to apply it accurately. Purchase two or more Libman Code Update courses together for volume discounts and bonus content.

title: ICD-10-CM: Selected Guidelines for Coding and Reporting
description: Detailed instruction on complex ICD-10-CM guideline topics including conventions, general guidelines, and chapter-specific guidelines for infectious diseases, neoplasms, circulatory, pregnancy, and injury/poisoning. Updated for FY 2026. 16-week enrollment.

title: ICD-10-CM: Outpatient Guidelines
description: Detailed instruction on ICD-10-CM conventions, general guidelines, and outpatient-specific guidelines (Section IV). Features outpatient-related advice from recent Coding Clinic issues. Updated for FY 2026. 16-week enrollment.

title: ICD-10-CM/PCS Guidelines Package
description: Bundles two courses: ICD-10-CM Selected Guidelines and ICD-10-PCS Guidelines: A Case Study Approach. Covers complex guideline topics for both diagnosis and inpatient procedure coding including 25+ case studies. Updated for FY 2026. 20-week enrollment.

title: ICD-10-PCS Guidelines: A Case Study Approach
description: Comprehensive review of ICD-10-PCS guidelines using 25+ cases to demonstrate real-world application. Covers spinal surgery, CABG, Section X codes, breast reconstruction, and complex guideline challenges. Emphasis on documentation and accurate code assignment. Updated for FY 2026. 16-week enrollment.

title: Decision Health Free CEU Quizzes
description: Create a free account to access multiple short quizzes, each worth 0.5 CEUs toward your CPC renewal. Covers a variety of coding and compliance topics. No cost — just create an account and start earning credit.
